mqttUrl.title: MQTT Broker URL
mqttUrl.description: URL of your MQTT broker, e.g. mqtt://192.168.1.100:1883 or mqtts://broker:8883

mqttUsername.title: MQTT Username
mqttUsername.description: Optional. Leave blank if no authentication is required.

mqttPassword.title: MQTT Password
mqttPassword.description: Optional. Leave blank if no authentication is required.

topicPrefix.title: MQTT Topic Prefix
topicPrefix.description: The topic prefix configured in NoCloud MQTT settings (default: NoCloud).

cleaningIterations.title: Cleaning Iterations
cleaningIterations.description: How many times each room should be cleaned per activation.

customOrder.title: Custom Order
customOrder.description: Pass customOrder=true in the cleaning payload (not supported by all firmware versions).

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (seconds)
discoveryTimeout.description: How long to wait for retained MQTT messages before giving up on discovering new robots.
